subject: Reset Your Password - Business Operations Suite
text: You requested a password reset. Please visit this link to reset your password: http://localhost:3000/auth/reset-password?token=51d5ddffdf2f5350ec88bc7d2d8fc0497e451b8748a08ba2fa659d1a52f30f4a
html:
Password Reset Request

We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to set a new password:

Reset Password

If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

http://localhost:3000/auth/reset-password?token=51d5ddffdf2f5350ec88bc7d2d8fc0497e451b8748a08ba2fa659d1a52f30f4a
